calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-062 x MECH-260 2x2 factorial monomodal-collapse falsifier on SP-CEM substrate
items.note: Closes arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-B. Re-issue of the canonical 543d 2x2 factorial monomodal-collapse falsifier on the support-preserving CEM (SP-CEM) substrate. The 543d design is UNCHANGED -- same 4 arms (ARM_0 gated/dacc OFF, ARM_1 dacc-only suppression_weight=0.5, ARM_2 gated-only, ARM_3 both), same pre-registered D1-D4 cross-arm grid (D1 dACC-alone; D2 dACC-adds-to-gated; D3 gated-adds-to-dACC; D4 543c null replication), same PASS=D2 AND D3 rule, same FAIL routing, same claim_ids=[ARC-062, MECH-309] and per-claim evidence-direction map. The ONLY change: all 4 arms now build the agent with support-preserving CEM enabled (use_support_preserving_cem=True + support_preserving_stratified_elites=True + support_preserving_ao_std_floor=0.2 + support_preserving_min_first_action_classes=2 -- the exact config V3-EXQ-567 validated PASS for ARC-065, which lifted natural selected_action_entropy 0.0124->0.49 and candidate support 1.00->2.80). Rationale: the 543b/c/d line ran on the OLD collapsed CEM whose candidates were structurally near-indistinguishable (~1e-4..1e-5 spread), so the ARC-062 gated heads had no candidate-feature variance to discriminate on -- those runs stay non_contributory/weakens and are NOT force-mapped. Per arc_062_rule_apprehension_plan.md decision-log 2026-05-16 (closure-map reconciliation) the substrate-redesign branch was effectively taken and validated by the ARC-065 SP-CEM line; this re-run is the FIRST contributory test of MECH-309. experiment_purpose=evidence (architecturally load-bearing falsifier). Mac affinity matches 543b/c/d precedent. Local smoke dry-run 2026-05-16T234109Z PASS wiring: exit 0, 12 verdict lines (4 arms x 3 seeds), 36 [train] ep N/M progress lines (denom=loop-bound total_train_episodes), 12 Seed/Condition boundaries, gated_policy/dacc toggle correctly per arm, SP-CEM flags verified reaching config.hippocampal in all 4 arms, D1-D4 printout works, ASCII-only verified, runner-conformance contract validated.
